state.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime and maintenance-notice dispute
state.ruling_reason: The independent monitor shows 99.1% uptime, which is below the 99.5% commitment in SLA-1. The major downtime on May 12 is not excluded from the calculation because it was announced only 2 hours in advance, failing the 24-hour notice requirement in SLA-2. The calculated uptime falls within the 98.00% to 99.49% range specified in SLA-3 for a partial refund.
